description: Maps and places via OpenStreetMap (no API key): geocode a place name (action=search), reverse-geocode coordinates (reverse), find nearby points of interest like cafes/pharmacies/parks (nearby), road distance and travel time (distance), turn-by-turn directions (directions), timezone for coordinates (timezone), or bounding-box info for a named area (area).

near.description: Address/city/landmark to search around (for nearby, instead of lat/lon)

category.description: POI category for nearby: restaurant, cafe, bar, bakery, supermarket, pharmacy, hospital, hotel, gas_station, parking, park, gym, library, museum, cinema, atm, bank, school, police, post_office, church, and similar OSM categories

radius.description: Search radius in metres for nearby (default 500)
